steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The passage establishes that Montaigne questions his own perspective throughout his essays, then presents his personal motto: “What do I know?” This motto directly expresses the questioning habit just described.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content:
Fittingly signals that the motto is an expected, appropriate expression of Montaigne's questioning habit. The other choices either indicate contrast, introduce timing, or suggest reluctance rather than appropriateness.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
